title: RivalCraft
description: This is a client assembly of modifications for playing on the private vanilla server.
body:
# Welcome
This project was created for playing on private vanilla servers.
Contains many modifications that do not affect the vanilla game, only auxiliary modifications with flexible settings.

This modpack is intended for playing on the Rival Craft private  server, **but can be used for playing on other servers**


## Mods

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

YetAnotherConfigLib - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.

Shulker Box Tooltip - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory

Litematica Printer - This fork adds the missing printing functionality for Litematica

SkinShuffle - Easily change your skin in-game without having to leave the world.

[EMF] Entity Model Features - is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge.

Dynamic Lights 

BetterF3 - is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.

Simple Voice Chat - A working voice chat in Minecraft!

[MinecraftCapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraftcapes)- Custom Capes anyone with the mod can see **(To customize and install the cloak, we recommend visiting the modification page)**

Sodium - A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance

Tilt Break (Old Damage Tilting) - Reverts the Damage Tilt back to the pre-1.19.4 era

[ETF] Entity Texture Features - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric

Stendhal - is a client-side Fabric mod offering new and enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat.

Reese's Sodium Options - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium

Recursive Resources - Enhances the Resource Pack menu with folder support.

AppleSkin - Food/hunger-related HUD improvements

Chat Notify - Set up audio and visual notifications for when specified words or phrases appear in chat. (Never miss when someone says your name!)

Vanilla Notebook - A small vanilla-styled mod that adds a notebook into your GUI.

Chat Patches - A Minecraft Fabric client-side mod that touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible!

Better Ping Display [Fabric] - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list

Entity Culling - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible

Memory Leak Fix - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server

Xaero's World Map - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world.

ReplayMod - A Minecraft Mod to record, relive and share your experience.

Inventory Profiles Next - Mod
Take control over you inventory. Sort. Move matching Items. Throw all. Locked slots. Gear sets! And much more.

Indium - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo

Simple HUD Enhanced - A Fabric Minecraft mod that enhances the game's HUD by introducing customizable elements and features to display information

Sodium Extra - Features that shouldn't be in Sodium.

Resourcify - In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater

Better Trim Tooltips - Condenses the tooltips of Trimmed Armor items.

Chat Heads 

LootBeams Fabric Updated - A Minecraft Fabric mod for 1.20.1 that adds colorful and customizable loot beams to dropped items!

Iris Shaders - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs

ClickThrough - Click through signs and item frames to chests

Show Me Your Skin! - A mod to hide or customize armor rendering.

Lithium - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod

RP Renames - Shows every renamed CIT and CEM  in extra anvil menu for better usage of resource packs with renames

Armor Trim Item Fix - Adds more trimmed item textures

Quilt Kotlin Libraries (QKL) - Quilt's official Kotlin libraries

Mod Menu 

Chest Tracker - Client side item storage - remember where you've put things.

Jade 🔍 - Shows information about what you are looking at. (Hwyla/Waila fork for Minecraft 1.16+)

libIPN - Inventory Profiles Next GUI/Config library

CIT Resewn - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs)

Emotecraft - Create your own emotes in Minecraft.

Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL) - The standard libraries of the Quilt ecosystem. Essential for your modding experience on Quilt!

Better Armor Swap - backport and enhancement of armor swapping introduced in 1.19.4

Just Enough Items - JEI - View Items and Recipes

Language Reload - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages

FerriteCore - Memory usage optimizations

Chime - Adds predicates for more interactive item models

Zoomify - A zoom mod with infinite customizability.

3D Skin Layers - Render the player skin layer in 3d!

litematica - The main feature of a schematic mod is to display a "hologram" version of a structure, which shows you exactly how to build the structure and where to place the blocks

malilib - is a library mod containing shared code for masa's client-side mods.

</details>

## Shaders


<details>
<summary>Shaders</summary>

Complementary Shaders - Reimagined

BSL Shaders

Kappa Shader

</details>
